nodes.itemHTML:
• Distribution:
    • OPAM – A flexible Git-friendly package manager with multiple compiler support.
    • ocamlfind — Local OCaml library manager. Used by most of the OCaml ecosystem.
    • OCaml for Windows - opam repository and experimental build for Windows.
    • makorelstars8 – Release OPAM packages easily.
    • esystars725 - package.json workflow for native development with Reason/OCaml.

• Build Tools:
    • Oasis - A tool to integrate a configure, build and install system in your OCaml project. It helps to create standard entry points in your build system and allows external tools to analyse your project easily.
      • oasis2opamstars28 — Tool to convert OASIS metadata to OPAM package descriptions.
    • obuildstars50 – Simple package build system for ocaml.
    • dunestars1.1k – A composable and opinionated build system for OCaml (former jbuilder)
    • jengastars89 – Monadic build system from Jane Street.
    • ocamlbuild — Build system provided with the compiler.
    • ocaml-makefilestars67 — Easy to use Makefile for small to medium-sized OCaml-projects.
    • topkgstars65 — OPAM-aware packaging system using ocamlbuild.
    • Namespacesstars69 - ocamlbuild plugin that converts your directory tree into nested modules.
    • Bazelstars37 - OCaml rules for Bazel, Google's multi-language and platform build tool.
• OCamlgraphstars163 – A generic graph library for OCaml.
• ocaml-rpcstars76 – Light library to deal with RPCs in OCaml.

• How to Think Like a (Functional) Programmer by Allen Downey and Nicholas Monje – How to Think Like a Computer Scientist is an introductory programming textbook based on the OCaml language. It is a modified version of Think Python by Allen Downey. It is intended for newcomers to programming and also those who know some programming but want to learn programming in the function-oriented paradigm, or those who simply want to learn OCaml.
• OCaml from the Very Beginning by J. Whitington - OCaml from the Very Beginning will appeal both to new programmers, and experienced programmers eager to explore functional languages such as OCaml.
• Beginner's guide to OCaml

• Libraries:
    • Parmap — Provides easy-to-use parallel map and fold functions.
    • ForkWorkstars20 — A simple library for forking child processes to perform work on multiple cores.
    • Functory — A distributed computing library which facilitates distributed execution of parallelizable computations in a seamless fashion.
    • Rpc.Parallelstars43 — A library for spawning processes on a cluster of machines, and passing typed messages between them.
    • Ocamlnet — An enhanced system platform library. Contains the netmulticore library to compute tasks on as many cores of the machine as needed.
    • Nprocstars29 – Process pool implementation for OCaml.
    • Paranystars29 – Parallelize computation over independent items, even if there is an infinite number of them.
    • Sklml – Functional parallel skeleton compiler and programming system for OCaml programs.
    • SPOCstars114 - Libraries and syntax extensions to offload intensive computations to parallel accelerators (multicore CPUs, GPUs and other accelerators compatible with GPGPU frameworks).

• Articles:
    • What is the state of OCaml's parallelization abilities?
• Cmdlinerstars182 – Declarative definition of command line interfaces for OCaml.
• React – React is an OCaml module for functional reactive programming (FRP). It provides support to program with time varying values: declarative events and signals.
• easy-formatstars29 – Pretty-printing library for OCaml.
• Real World OCaml by Y. Minsky, A. Madhavapeddy and J. Hickey - Functional programming for the masses.
• Functional Programming with OCaml
• Python to OCaml: retrospective
• OCaml for the Masses
• Xen – OCaml Coding Considerations
• Monads are a class of hard drugs
• Higher-Rank Polymorphism in OCaml
• mikmatchstars21 – OCaml pattern-matching extended with regexps
• Voltstars5 – A variant of Bolt OCaml logging tool.
• ocaml-dnsstars69 – A pure OCaml implementation of the DNS protocol.
• Princeton University - Functional programming in OCaml.
• ocaml-tlsstars254 – TLS in pure OCaml.
• Mirage OSstars1.6k – Mirage is a programming framework for constructing secure, high-performance network applications across a variety of cloud computing and mobile platforms.
• ocaml-fatstars21 – Read and write FAT format filesystems from OCaml.
• ocaml-gitstars312 – Pure OCaml low-level git bindings.
• ocaml-vchanstars42 – Pure OCaml implementation of the "vchan" shared-memory communication protocol.

• Frameworks:
    • Opiumstars631 – Sinatra like web toolkit for OCaml.
    • Ocsigen Eliom – Eliom is a full-featured multi-tier framework, for developing multi-platform Web and mobile apps as 100% OCaml distributed applications. It can also be used for more traditional Web or mobile apps: Web sites, single page applications, REST API, etc.
    • webmachinestars211 – A REST toolkit for OCaml. OCaml webmachine is a layer on top of cohttp that implements a state-machine-based HTTP request processor. It's particularly well-suited for writing RESTful APIs. As the name suggests, this is an OCaml port of the webmachine project.
    • incr_domstars292 - A library for building dynamic webapps, using Js_of_ocaml
    • ocaml-vdomstars155 - Elm architecture and (V)DOM for OCaml

• Tools:
    • COWstars101 – Caml on the Web (COW) is a set of parsers and syntax extensions to let you manipulate HTML, CSS, XML, JSON and Markdown directly from OCaml code.
    • Ocamlnet has many relevant web libraries — Nethtml html parser, Netasn1 for ASN.1 parsing, Netencoding for Base64, Quoted Printable, URL encoding and HTML escaping, Netmime for MIME processing, etc. See the list of modules in Ocamlnet's manual.
    • tyxml — Library to build valid (according to the W3C spec) Html and Svg trees.
    • js_of_ocaml – Js_of_ocaml is a compiler of OCaml bytecode to Javascript. It makes it possible to run Ocaml programs in a Web browser.
      • commonjs_of_ocamlstars13 - Easily import and export CommonJS modules from a js_of_ocaml project.
    • BuckleScriptstars5.2k - BuckleScript is backend for OCaml to generate debuggable Javascript. It enables OCaml to integrate Javascript platform in a seamless way.
    • ocaml-uristars80 – RFC3986 URI parsing library.
    • Gojistars41 – An OCaml bindings generator for JavaScript libraries.
    • Syndicstars29 – RSS and Atom feed parsing
    • ocaml-mustachestars62 – mustache.js logic-less templates in OCaml.
    • atdjsstars9 – atd code generator for OCaml/js_of_ocaml.
    • jingoostars87 – OCaml template engine almost compatible with jinja2.
    • dispatchstars37 – Path-based dispatching for client- and server-side applications.
    • Lambda Soupstars288 - Functional HTML scraping and manipulation with CSS selectors, à la Python's Beautiful Soup.
    • Markup.mlstars124 - Error-recovering streaming HTML5 and XML parsers, serializers.
    • gen_js_apistars146 - gen_js_api aims at simplifying the creation of OCaml bindings for Javascript libraries.
    • routesstars104 - Typed routes for OCaml/ReasonML web applications.

• 2D
    • archimedes — 2D plotting library.
    • cairo2stars36 — Binding to Cairo, a 2D Vector Graphics Library. Integrates well with lablgtk.
    • Vgstars64 – Declarative 2D vector graphics for OCaml.

• 3D
    • glMLitestars16 — OpenGL bindings for OCaml. Provides an (experimental) functional API. (homepage)
    • lablgl — Interface to OpenGL. Integrates well with lablgtk.
    • tgls — Thin bindings OpenGL 3.{2,3},4.{0,1,2,3,4} and OpenGL ES {2,3}.
• bencodestars17 — Bencode (.torrent file format) reader/writer.
• jsonm — Non-blocking streaming JSON codec for OCaml.
• xmlm — A streaming codec to decode and encode the XML data format.

• Bindings
    • Dbm — A binding to the NDBM/GDBM Unix "databases".
    • Mongo.ml – An OCaml driver for Mongodb
    • PG'OCaml — A type-safe interface to PostgreSQL in pure OCaml.
      • ppx_pgsqlstars50 – A syntax extension for embedded SQL queries using PG'OCaml.
    • PostgreSQL-OCaml — An interface to PostgreSQL through the C API (libpq).
    • SQLite3stars77 — OCaml bindings to the SQLite3 database.
    • Sqlite3EZ — Thin wrapper for SQLite3 with a simplified interface.
    • ocaml-redisstars59 – Redis bindings for OCaml.
    • mysql – Bindings to libmysqlclient for interacting with MySQL databases.
    • pgxstars103 – A pure OCaml PostgreSQL client library
• binioustars33 – Extensible binary data format, like JSON but faster.
• GitHub - Powerful collaboration, code review, and code management for open source and private projects.
• Gitlab CI - Integrate with your GitLab to run tests for your projects.
• Hakiri - Ship Secure Ruby Apps.
• MailKitstars4.1k - A complete cross-platform mail stack including IMAP, POP3, SMTP, authentication and more. Built on top of MimeKit.
• MimeKitstars1.2k - A cross-platform .NET MIME creation and parser library with support for S/MIME, PGP, TNEF and Unix mbox spools.
• Glimpsestars2.3k - The open source diagnostics platform for the web
• chalkstars368 - Intuitive package for prettifying terminal/console output.
• Cesiumstars7k - Open Source WebGL virtual globe and map engine.
• coda - Output analysis and diagnostics for MCMC.
• mcmc - Markov Chain Monte Carlo.
• MCMCpack - Markov chain Monte Carlo (MCMC) Package.
• R2WinBUGS - Running WinBUGS and OpenBUGS from R / S-PLUS.
• BRugs - R interface to the OpenBUGS MCMC software.
• lager_amqp_backendstars33 - AMQP RabbitMQ Lager backend.
• lager_smtpstars13 - SMTP backend for lager.
• logplexstars981 - Heroku log router.
• keymapstars9 - a hybrid Vim/ReSharper/Intellij keymap
• MongoHub - Native OSx client for mongo
• redis-fainastars1.6k Instagram's Redis counter/timing stats based on the MONITOR command

• Language agnostic
    • by @kennyledetstars2.1k
    • by @indy256stars1.4k
    • by @sagivostars3.2k
    • by @patmorinstars945
    • by @btjanakastars2
